title: Feat implementation continuation - manual-safe teamwork and remaining skill/resource metadata batch

manualAutomationPolicy.policy: Do not pretend the system knows battlefield positioning, nearby allies, formations, or whether allies share a teamwork feat unless a specific future UI/runtime context explicitly supplies that information.
implementedAutomatically: Clear always-on base skill bonuses such as the +3 competence bonus on team-feat skill checks.
Skill/Force/resource metadata where the triggering context is already represented by existing roll or skill-use systems.
leftManual: Nearby-ally scaling such as +1 per ally within 12 squares.
Aid Another overrides that require knowing a specific assisting ally has the feat.
Mount/vehicle/bodyguard/team formation reactions that need map state, target identity, or GM adjudication.

changedFeats.name: Wary Sentries
changedFeats.change: Base +3 competence skill bonus is implemented; nearby-ally scaling, Aid Another overrides, and battlefield/teamwork clauses are preserved as manual player/GM resolution metadata instead of automated positioning logic.

engineChanges.change: Skill bonus formula resolution now clamps formula-based values with min/max support. Removed the attempted nearby-ally scaling automation from this phase; team feat scaling is intentionally manual/table-managed.

notes: This phase was adjusted after user guidance: feats that require nearby allies, positioning, formation state, or other heavy battlefield automation should be treated as flavor/manual metadata unless the current engine can resolve them honestly.

Team feats now implement their clear base +3 competence skill bonus but do not automatically count nearby allies. Their descriptions and teamworkRules preserve the extra clauses for player/GM resolution.
No runtime Foundry test was run in this environment. JSON and JS syntax validation were run after patching.
